votingInfo.idInfo: South Carolina requires photo ID to vote. Acceptable IDs include SC Driver's License, SC DMV ID Card, SC Voter Registration Card with Photo, Federal Military ID, or US Passport.
votingInfo.earlyVotingNote: Early voting begins 14 days before election day
